id.description: This is a unique identifier for return line, that can be assigned during return order creation. This is not the same as referenceOrderLineId which refers to the original order line that is being returned.

referenceOrderId.description: Id of the forward order where the device was purchased which is being returned as part of this return in this return line

referenceOrderLineId.description: LineId of the forward order line where the device was purchased which is being returned as part of this return in this return line

refundedAmount.description: Refunded amount for this return line
